steps.title: What Plexus is
steps.narration: Plexus is the connective tissue. It looks across the flagships, finds which one produces a capability another one needs, and draws the wiring between them.
steps.command: echo plexus - a cross-flagship interop mesh that finds and wires real capability edges
steps.stdout: plexus - a cross-flagship interop mesh that finds and wires real capability edges
steps.output: plexus - a cross-flagship interop mesh that finds and wires real capability edges

steps.title: The capability surface
steps.narration: Discover the mesh, list producer and consumer pairs, plan the upstream pipeline that feeds an organ, or route a path from one tool to another. It turns a pile of separate tools into a graph you can reason about.
steps.stdout:
usage: plexus [-h] [--version]
              {discover,wiring,validate,plan,route,graph,run,export,mcp} ...

cli.py — plexus command line. plexus discover [--builtin] [--dir DIR] # the
mesh: organs, edges, orphans plexus wiring [...] # capability -> (producer,
consumer) pairs plexus plan --goal ORGAN [...] # upstream pipeline that feeds
ORGAN plexus route --from A --to B [...] # capability path from A to B plexus
validate [...] # manifest problems (exit 1 if any)

positional arguments:
  {discover,wiring,validate,plan,route,graph,run,export,mcp}

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --version             show program's version number and exit
steps.output:
usage: plexus [-h] [--version]
              {discover,wiring,validate,plan,route,graph,run,export,mcp} ...

cli.py — plexus command line. plexus discover [--builtin] [--dir DIR] # the
mesh: organs, edges, orphans plexus wiring [...] # capability -> (producer,
consumer) pairs plexus plan --goal ORGAN [...] # upstream pipeline that feeds
ORGAN plexus route --from A --to B [...] # capability path from A to B plexus
validate [...] # manifest problems (exit 1 if any)

positional arguments:
  {discover,wiring,validate,plan,route,graph,run,export,mcp}

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --version             show program's version number and exit

steps.title: The live mesh
steps.narration: And here is the mesh itself: the organs, and the real edges between them, each one pointing at the exact function that carries the capability across. Mneme feeding a thesis into Crucible, Gather feeding a digest. The whole spine, discovered rather than declared.
steps.stdout:
{
  "organs": [
    "crucible",
    "forum",
    "gather",
    "index",
    "mneme"
  ],
  "edges": [
    {
      "producer": "mneme",
      "consumer": "crucible",
      "capability": "crucible.thesis/1",
      "self_loop": false,
      "via": "src/mneme/compose.py:to_crucible_thesis"
    },
    {
      "producer": "gather",
      "consumer": "crucible",
      "capability": "gather.digest/1",
      "self_loop": false,
      "via": "src/gather/digest.py:Digest.to_json"
    },
    {
      "producer": "gather",
      "consumer": "mneme",
      "capability": "gather.items/1",
      "self_loop": false,
      "via": "src/gather/digest.py:_receipt"
    },
    {
      "producer": "index",
      "consumer": "index",
      "capability": "index.invalidation-pin/1",
      "self_loop": true,
      "via": "src/index_graph/freshness/invalidate.py:mint_pin"
    },
    {
      "producer": "index",
      "consumer": "crucible",
      "capability": "index.verification/1",
      "self_loop": false,
      "via": "src/index_graph/verify.py:build_verification"
    },
    {
      "producer": "index",
      "consumer": "index",
      "capability": "index.wiki/1",
      "self_loop": true,
      "via": "src/index_graph/wiki/pack.py:build_wiki_pack"
    },
    {
      "producer": "crucible",
      "consumer": "index",
      "capability": "project-telos.flagship-action/v1",
      "self_loop": false,
      "via": "src/crucible/flagship.py:envelope"
    },
    {
      "producer": "forum",
      "consumer": "index",
      "capability": "project-telos.flagship-action/v1",
      "self_loop": false,
      "via": "src/forum/flagship.py:envelope"
    },
    {
      "producer": "gather",
      "consumer": "index",
      "capability": "project-telos.flagship-action/v1",
      "self_loop": false,
      "via": "src/gather/flagship.py:envelope"
    },
    {
      "producer": "index",
      "consumer": "index",
      "capability": "project-telos.flagship-action/v1",
      "self_loop": true,
      "via": "src/index_graph/flagship.py:envelope"
    }
  ],
  "orphans": {
    "unmet_inputs": [
      "conversation-turns/1",
      "crucible.measurements/1",
      "external-agent-trace/1",
      "gather.run-config/1",
      "provenance.verdict/1"
    ],
    "unconsumed_outputs": [
      "crucible.assessment/1",
      "crucible.thesis-export/1",
      "forum.context-capsule/v1",
      "forum.flight-recorder/1",
      "gather.catalog-digest/1",
      "mneme.crucible-export/1",
      "mneme.drift-report/1",
      "mneme.provenance-chain/1",
      "mneme.recall/1",
      "project-telos.action-receipt/v1",
      "project-telos.context-envelope/v1",
      "project-telos.crucible.measurement-gate/v1"
    ]
  }
}
